articles.title: NZD/USD rebounds on strong Chinese data, RBNZ rate hike outlook
articles.expand: NZD/USD rises on Monday and trades around 0.5850 at the time of writing, up 1.42% on the day. The pair rebounds after several days of decline, supported by improving risk sentiment and macroeconomic factors favorable to the New Zealand Dollar (NZD).

articles.title: Australian Dollar Price Forecast: Bulls look at the RBA
articles.expand: The Australian Dollar (AUD) stays strong amid elevated inflation at home and the Reserve Bank of Australia’s (RBA) hawkish tilt. This combination keeps the door open for AUD/USD to rise even higher, and it also helps guard against occasional drops.

articles.title: GBP/USD Price Analysis: Cable rebounds as markets digest US–Iran war
articles.expand: The GBP/USD pair is trading near the 1.3310 price region, trimming almost all its losses from Friday and breaking its four-day losing streak, as investors seem to have digested the United States/Israeli escalation in the war against Iran over the weekend.

articles.title: EUR/GBP steady as traders await ECB and BoE decisions amid inflation concerns
articles.expand: The Euro (EUR) edges lower against the British Pound (GBP) on Monday, with EUR/GBP trimming earlier gains as traders refrain from making aggressive directional bets ahead of the European Central Bank (ECB) and Bank of England (BoE) interest-rate decisions due later this week.

articles.title: AUD/USD rises on RBA hike expectations, strong China data
articles.expand: AUD/USD rises on Monday, trading around 0.7060 at the time of writing, up 1.16% on the day. The pair rebounds strongly after two days of losses, supported by renewed optimism around the Australian Dollar (AUD) and expectations of further monetary tightening in Australia.
